violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

Cheese sliced in the establishment was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

ROP fish was observed thawing in an intact package in prep unit. ROP fish must be removed from ROP packaging before thawing. Fish was observed at 36DF. Fish was removed from ROP package. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top beverage cooler) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quat sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay. The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. Establishment must obtain test strips for the 3 bay and high temperature dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2026
The ceiling tiles above the flat top unit is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2026
Establishment was observed reduce oxygen packaging raw beef steaks. Establishment is to stop reduce oxygen packaging. ROP machine removed from premise. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Knife was observed stored between equipment. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen on prep unit 1 are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 0 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for the quat sanitizer is 200 ppm. Establishment filled bucket from sink, establishment is to have 3 bay dispenser fixed by company that services. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses on the cooking line. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023

The floor in the walk in cooler area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The floor is lifting up where the pieces connect. The floor must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
